keyChangesVsYesterday: DDR5 spot $41.833→$41.900 (+0.16%) — 4th consecutive ALL-TIME HIGH, Phase 6 deepening
🆕 DDR4 8Gb PC contract price breaks $20 for first time (+25% MoM) — DRAM full bull market chain complete
🆕 Newegg QLC 61.44TB new high $29,950 (was $24,600-$27,265) — premium tier pricing moving up
CDW-G 9550 Pro 30.72TB 'estimated delivery today' — strongest immediate availability signal in tracking history
Connection/GovConnection QLC 61.44TB 4th day persistence — alternative channel becomes sustained reliable option
Mouser QLC 61.44TB Day 11 — double-digit days milestone continues
DiscTech Day 31 — formally entering 8th week (2 months offline)
Samsung HBM4E HCB technical details (Hybrid Copper Bonding + PDN redesign with 97% defect reduction)

DDR5-6400.reason: NEMIX $1,488 31-day anchor (9th work week). DDR5 spot $41.900 4th consecutive ATH. DDR4 contract +25% breaks $20 — DRAM full bull market chain complete. Samsung production cut + TSP slowdown. HBM >20% wafer capacity. No waiting rationale.

DDR5-5600.reason: DDR5 spot $41.900 4th ATH. DDR4 contract +25% means OEM costs rising across all DRAM categories — DDR5 premium becomes more acceptable relative to rising DDR4 costs. 96GB NEMIX $3,200 entering 2nd month (9th tracking column request). Micron CEO '2027+'. Citi Q1→Q4 +82%.

PCIe4 TLC.reason: NAND Q1+85-90% + Q2+70-75% + Q3 full-year sustained. Goldman Sachs 4.2% deficit Day 9. Brand split Day 26 structural. Full supply chain sold out Day 34. 5-year SSD LTA standard. DDR4 contract +25% cross-validates full storage bull market. No waiting rationale.

PCIe5 TLC.reason: SS $17,700 Day 23 (5-week+ milestone). CDW-G 'delivery today' — strongest immediate availability signal ever. But consumer CDW + pack-of-10 still backordered. PM9D3a Day 12 not deliverable at Compuram but Lenovo OEM recognized. Samsung HBM5E postponed → advanced capacity directed to HBM4E → PCIe5 SSD packaging capacity squeezed. NAND Q3 full-year sustained → raw material costs rising all year.

PCIe4 QLC.reason: Mouser Day 11 U.2 only 1 unit, restock 9/7. Connection $33,048/GovConnection $33,213 4th day sustained — alternative channel now reliably available. Newegg new high $29,950 (+9.8%) — premium tier expanding upward, low-end sellers may be depleting inventory. DDR4 contract +25% + NAND Q3 sustained → full storage bull market logic irrefutable.

gaps.note: 31 consecutive days without enterprise 16GB DDR5-6400 RDIMM public pricing
Enterprise 16GB DDR5-5600 RDIMM extremely rare in open market
9th formal request. NEMIX $3,200 30+ day anchor with HPE/Dell/Hynix OEM cross-validation. Exceeds quality of several existing tracking columns.
VDURA $17,500 benchmark. DiscTech offline Day 31 (8th week). NAND Q3 sustained means tracking lag likely expanding.
No enterprise fresh public quotes. Only occasional OEM/legacy samples.
Enterprise QLC 7.68TB rarely traded. Market dominated by 15.36TB+.

structuralGaps.issue: DiscTech JS offline Day 31 — 8th week (2 months)
structuralGaps.detail: PCIe4 TLC primary source offline for two full months. HTTP 200 but 3 bytes raw. NAND Q3 sustained + DDR4 contract +25% cross-validate full storage bull market — tracking lag repair urgency at all-time high.
3.5 weeks+ both critical verification sources blocked. DDR5/PCIe4 TLC/QLC verification capability constrained.

structuralGaps.issue: Mouser QLC 61.44TB U.2 supply crisis Day 11
structuralGaps.detail: Only 1 unit Day 11, restock 9/7. Connection/GovConnection alternative channels 4th day sustained — crisis severity downgraded to 'channel fragmentation with 34% premium.' Newegg new high $29,950 suggests low-end seller inventory depleting.
4th consecutive ATH. $42.00 only $0.10 away (+0.24%). May monthly gain ~$2.07 (+5.2%) — strongest month since tracking began. $42 breakthrough would trigger psychological acceleration.

structuralGaps.issue: DDR4 contract $20 milestone — DRAM bull chain complete
structuralGaps.detail: DDR4 8Gb PC contract breaks $20 for first time (+25% MoM). DDR5 spot → DDR5 contract → DDR4 spot → DDR4 contract — full chain complete. Implication: low-cost substitution path (DDR4 instead of DDR5) closing. Bull market no longer DDR5-specific.

samsungVoteAftermath.status: Strike risk CLOSED. TSP packaging slowdown Day 4 — no resolution signal. HBM4E HCB technical breakthrough coexists with organizational friction.

ddr5Spot.phase: Phase 6 deepening — 4th consecutive ATH, slope moderating but direction certain

ddr4Spot.status: Accelerating — 4th day of concurrent rally with DDR5

ddr4Contract.milestone: DDR4 8Gb PC contract breaks $20 for first time (+25% MoM)
ddr4Contract.significance: DRAM full bull market chain complete — from DDR5 spot to DDR4 contract, all categories rising
